不是真的，怎么文风都变了，甜了好多，好甜好甜好甜好甜好甜好甜好甜好甜好甜[舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏][舔屏]
真的很欢快啊啊啊ヽ(´•ω•`)､"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721980996,"group_id":"7250532714720267299","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1893823900564971"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7250532714720267299","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"922"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读20小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":72750,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7394036249089573657","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很久没看纯悬疑推理类的小说了，这本不冗杂，也不拖拉，看的很有代入感，好几次都不敢呼吸。真的好看！！！cp超好磕，除了主角以外，还有一对（还没看到，看到再补充）","text_exts":[{"e":9,"s":5,"text":"悬疑推理","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%82%AC%E7%96%91%E6%8E%A8%E7%90%86&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407339059D79D10%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227394036249089573657%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227250532714720267299%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%82%AC%E7%96%91%E6%8E%A8%E7%90%86%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721561253,"group_id":"7250532714720267299","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"晚夜微雨问海棠","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8blcComaDMotAheVNZmrKYln+pqvr8BHctNuYlRbjXz","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/68c1f73609844fcdb19484184bc8c8e4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623758&x-signature=Ee9dUTMSK%2FphfEqu%2FBms7vBd9Fo%3D","user_id":"1893823900564971","user_name":"谢花怜蝶シ"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1893823900564971","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7250532714720267299","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主+真CP+双洁+无虐+暗恋+中期后感情线非常多！！】
【悬疑推理。
警察贺威X亦正亦邪的双面“侦探”白计安。
协同破案，无系统，高智商，各种疯批齐聚一堂】
两年前，樾安市发生一起“普通”的杀人案。
凶手的作案手法并不稀奇，可诡异点就在于，不但凶案现场没有发现任何线索，连调查被害人的社会关系时也没有发现任何问题，可以说除了杀与被杀，凶手与被害人之间没有任何联系。
“林局，听说隔壁九龙市抓到一个连环杀人犯，会不会是两年前悬案的凶手流窜过去的？”
“不会。”林栋拿起手边的文件递给贺威，面色沉重：“他又犯案了。”
贺威接过文件翻开，脸色却比两年前好看得多。
“怎么？有把握？”
“嗯。”贺威合上文件，淡淡一笑，道：“因为，他回来了。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7019ab1b9d260e8010ab989007e4d821","author":"京野谲","author_id":"","book_id":"7250532714720267299","book_name":"猎罪档案：浴血天使","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2566人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7250534127299101216","read_count":"2566","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2529577"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"1231","tags":"悬疑灵异,推理,破案,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f868066391aff604bb3f2a9d81cb4f0a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257390&x-signature=vnSN%2FAr%2Bzpr2lHNssaD7NDhtBGY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109333536443","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"517"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321140949EAAE0A8E294559D79D10"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读18小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":65071,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5000},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1721565972,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":
